canonical.text:
config/schema.json is the single authoritative source of field rules; each validator in
src/validators/ (sku.js, price.js, qty.js, category.js) hardcodes its own copy of those
rules and has drifted out of sync with it. Fix each validator so it exactly matches
config/schema.json: sku's length must be within [minLength, maxLength] inclusive; price
must be >= min; qty must be an integer within [min, max] inclusive; category must accept
exactly the values in enum, no others. Check config/schema.json for the current numbers
before fixing each file -- the old hardcoded bounds are stale and do not match it. Run
node --test until all tests pass.

perturbations.text:
Complete the following repository task. Preserve existing behavior and verify the tests.

config/schema.json is the single authoritative source of field rules; each validator in
src/validators/ (sku.js, price.js, qty.js, category.js) hardcodes its own copy of those
rules and has drifted out of sync with it. Fix each validator so it exactly matches
config/schema.json: sku's length must be within [minLength, maxLength] inclusive; price
must be >= min; qty must be an integer within [min, max] inclusive; category must accept
exactly the values in enum, no others. Check config/schema.json for the current numbers
before fixing each file -- the old hardcoded bounds are stale and do not match it. Run
node --test until all tests pass.

Repository change request:
config/schema.json is the single authoritative source of field rules; each validator in
src/validators/ (sku.js, price.js, qty.js, category.js) hardcodes its own copy of those
rules and has drifted out of sync with it. Fix each validator so it exactly matches
config/schema.json: sku's length must be within [minLength, maxLength] inclusive; price
must be >= min; qty must be an integer within [min, max] inclusive; category must accept
exactly the values in enum, no others. Check config/schema.json for the current numbers
before fixing each file -- the old hardcoded bounds are stale and do not match it. Run
node --test until all tests pass.

Use the smallest correct change and confirm the test suite.

Please solve this task in the supplied checkout, retaining all stated edge cases:

config/schema.json is the single authoritative source of field rules; each validator in
src/validators/ (sku.js, price.js, qty.js, category.js) hardcodes its own copy of those
rules and has drifted out of sync with it. Fix each validator so it exactly matches
config/schema.json: sku's length must be within [minLength, maxLength] inclusive; price
must be >= min; qty must be an integer within [min, max] inclusive; category must accept
exactly the values in enum, no others. Check config/schema.json for the current numbers
before fixing each file -- the old hardcoded bounds are stale and do not match it. Run
node --test until all tests pass.

sufficiency.assertion: sku length bound matches config/schema.json's minLength/maxLength inclusive
sufficiency.prompt_evidence: sku's length must be within [minLength, maxLength] inclusive

sufficiency.assertion: price lower bound matches config/schema.json's min inclusive
qty is validated as an integer within config/schema.json's min/max inclusive
sufficiency.prompt_evidence: qty must be an integer within [min, max] inclusive

sufficiency.assertion: category accepts exactly config/schema.json's enum values, no others
sufficiency.prompt_evidence: exactly the values in enum, no others

sufficiency.assertion: the fix must be read from config/schema.json, not guessed or left at old hardcoded bounds
sufficiency.prompt_evidence:
Check config/schema.json for the current numbers
before fixing each file -- the old hardcoded bounds are stale and do not match it.
